[30;1m4296 | [0m[35m      const key = keyof(value, ++index, values);[0m
[30;1m4297 | [0m[35m      const group = groups.get(key);[0m

[30;1m4299 | [0m[35m      else groups.set(key, [value]);[0m
[30;1m4300 | [0m[35m    }[0m

[30;1m54 | [0m[35mTo create a periodically updated graph, call the update method returned by `render`:[0m
[30;1m55 | [0m[35m```[0m
[30;1m56 | [0m[35mconst ms = 1000;  // millisecond period[0m
[30;1m57 | [0m[35m[0m
